textByHash.34720bab380fd2aff0f19da4ac1bcda560efceb1: Very nice, dearie, but that belongs to Fairy Nuff. I should put it back on her wall before she misses it if I were you. You wouldn't want her to think you stole it now, would you?
textByHash.abca7807798922eae5e3698efbd31e36b6b125e6: Sorry dearie, no, but I have seen a sign with similar marks near the mysterious ruins. You know, the ones that lead you to the Cosmic Rune Altar.
textByHash.0cc1711188ddf080c86f8258cd3fd8a0a1675357: 'Ello, sugar. I'm afraid I can't gossip right now, I've got a cake in the oven.
textByHash.aefcf703e27215a91f44c8019182ae6705d8fa9f: Oi you! Did you think I didn't see that? That's my chocolate bar, that is!
textByHash.c8ca1db59ae100cd152adb5891592291e8b97870: That's alright, honey. You look a bit thin anyway. Take it if you need it.
